data.body:
=== HANDOFF part 3: ENDGAME / LANDING ===
GERRIT: remote 'gerrit'=RebarBotNava@rebar.solutions.navateam.com/a/rebar. commit-msg hook (Change-Id) is in the shared .git/hooks (worktrees inherit). Push updated stack: 'git push gerrit HEAD:refs/for/main' (relation chain; existing changes updated by Change-Id, new commits become new changes). Vote check (auth pinned to RebarBotNava): CRED=$(printf 'protocol=https
host=rebar.solutions.navateam.com
username=RebarBotNava

' | git credential fill); then curl -s -u user:pass 'https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/a/changes/?q=owner:self+status:open+project:rebar&o=LABELS' | sed 1d | (parse Verified/LLM-Review). Submittable = Verified +1 AND LLM-Review +1. Submit a change: POST /a/changes/<n>/submit (submitting top of a relation chain submits ancestors too). RebarBotNava (Contributor) CAN submit.
LANDING SEQUENCE: (a) implement remaining 4 children -> commit -> push (updates the stack; new changes for 5274/7c92/9f40/44be). (b) rebase onto latest origin/main before final submit if main moved. (c) run full 'make lint && make typecheck && make test' green as pre-flight. (d) as each Gerrit change goes Verified+1 AND LLM-Review+1, close its rebar ticket (bottom-first: 4532,9cf3,090a,6619,6c4b then 5274,7c92,9f40,44be — the 10 already-closed just need Verified+1 to submit) then submit. (e) address any LLM-Review -1 (real finding = fix diff + amend + re-push; infra-veto 'coverage-gap' tag = re-check) and Verified -1 (CI fail = open the run; if flake comment 'recheck'). (f) close EPIC via completion verifier (rebar transition effete-sanctified-sambar in_progress closed) AFTER all children closed AND c244 no longer a child. (g) SUBMIT the whole stack (submit top change submits ancestors) to LAND on main together.
MONITORING: this session had a persistent Gerrit vote Monitor (stops at session end); new session should re-establish one or poll. 5274 review was IN-FLIGHT at handoff (re-run: rebar review-plan ordinary-cloth-chipmunk --ref HEAD). Subagent delegation worked well for large refactors (25bf,4428,4532,090a,6619,6c4b) — give precise briefs incl module-size constraints + test-patch-surface warnings + 'verify with ruff+targeted pytest, do NOT commit/git'.
